name: Referral Intake & Contact
description: Every referral is contacted within 4 business hours of intake, and the outcome is logged. If a referral has not been reached after 3 attempts within 24 business hours, it is escalated to a human.

entity.name: Referral
entity.description: A person referred to Empire Homecare for DME services

correlationKey.description: The referral's phone number, as submitted on the intake form

promise.text: Every referral is contacted within 4 business hours of intake, and the outcome is logged.

startConditions.description: A new referral arrives via the intake form or Google Sheet row
startConditions.trigger: New row in the referral intake Google Sheet / webhook POST from the intake form

states.name: Received
states.description: The referral has arrived and is awaiting first contact.

states.name: Contact Attempted
states.description: At least one call attempt has been logged.

states.name: Contacted
states.description: The referral was reached; awaiting an outcome.

states.name: No Answer (Expired)
states.description: Three attempts made, never reached, SLA window expired.

events.name: Call Attempted
events.description: A call attempt was logged, regardless of outcome.

terminalOutcomes.description: The referral was contacted and scheduled an appointment.
The promise to attempt contact was kept even though the referral declined.
The referral was never reached within the SLA window.

exceptions.condition: No contact-attempt evidence 4 business hours after intake
exceptions.suggestedAction: Call the referral immediately and log the outcome.

evidenceRequirements.description: The call log entry recording the attempt's result.

assumptions.text: Assumed a 3-attempt cap before expiring to no_answer -- confirm this matches Empire's real call policy.
